---
layout: default
title: "Jharkhand News Brief: June 25, 2026"
date: 2026-06-25T15:39:38.723568+00:00
summary: "High Court rulings on CM Hemant Soren and custodial death, recruitment drives, infrastructure development, and local road safety incidents"
run_time_ist: "9:09PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Dumka Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 9:09PM</p>

<h2 class="section-title">Dumka and Nearby</h2>
<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Road accidents:</strong> A youth died and another was critically injured in a collision with an unknown vehicle in Maheshpur, Pakur, while two youths died in a separate accident in Dumriya, Deoghar.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">L1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">L4</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Fraud case:</strong> A sweet shop owner in Dumka was defrauded of over one lakh rupees by individuals promising to provide a tractor.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">L2</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Shravani Mela preparations:</strong> The SP and SDO conducted an inspection in Basukinath to review arrangements for the upcoming 2026 Shravani Mela.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">L7</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Recruitment drive:</strong> A walk-in interview for 526 jail guard (Kakshpal) positions will be held across the Hazaribagh and Dumka divisions.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijgFBVV95cUxOcDNTcUNDV01aWW03ZVVYcFM3LUNzQjNMNHAwZE0wbXp5cFBlcEZMWVBaVVRoUVhPTDdCQ0NEYzNNb2xaN2l6Uk13VmpGeTVCSlVBYzZKc2ViUVN5R1oxb1RLWU50TTFsOEFHb2plNFpuTXBrTjRRYTZtRllSQ2tIRWhqUlFjT25IV1JGQXJR?oc=5">L6</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Administrative training:</strong> Officials in Masaliya conducted training for BLA-2 personnel regarding the intensive revision of voter lists.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">L5</a></span></li>
</ul>
<h2 class="section-title">Jharkhand</h2>
<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Legal relief for CM:</strong> The Jharkhand High Court has quashed the 2014 Model Code of Conduct violation FIR against Chief Minister Hemant Soren.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqgFBVV95cUxPc2thV2NHU1pnajUtTzBodHBWYVE0M0xjTWlLbkFEbWdUVkJYbXRtNWcxTEY4UTRTSXZ1ZEdoRS1nUE9wUXJ2T0VMZ0IxR1JoUlZ6a1JlMzZ2VFFiNXV2dGFDZE90T2ZFOTFxbmg4OVN4NHVJSTZuRTh2NEZrOGVWaGtjSGV2QjM0bmNxcHE3MGd1QTd2NzNIcVhHbzgxYTVCcFhpcGEtWHEtdw?oc=5">J2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxNODVYdGN1dXhTS2FONjNzeUNMUDIwdEhFZzJQNmxGcnowU3Y4VG1GaC0zdzZZRjF3N09YQU5aM0dBa2pIQlRBem1zdVpCNW5qRDVyLTJlb1BSZUtOR0huSmh0U3l0Tnl3NjAwQUdVbnBMSEdUVzFydjZueUxSMXpCVG45eHNHM2V3Y2pJb0cteEhxRVhrQllsdzNkV3RSZw?oc=5">J4</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Judicial orders:</strong> The High Court has ordered a judicial inquiry into a custodial death in Palamu and suggested amendments to the compensation scheme for male acid attack victims.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqgFBVV95cUxPc2thV2NHU1pnajUtTzBodHBWYVE0M0xjTWlLbkFEbWdUVkJYbXRtNWcxTEY4UTRTSXZ1ZEdoRS1nUE9wUXJ2T0VMZ0IxR1JoUlZ6a1JlMzZ2VFFiNXV2dGFDZE90T2ZFOTFxbmg4OVN4NHVJSTZuRTh2NEZrOGVWaGtjSGV2QjM0bmNxcHE3MGd1QTd2NzNIcVhHbzgxYTVCcFhpcGEtWHEtdw?oc=5">J2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J8</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Employment and policy:</strong> The state government announced direct recruitment for jail guards with an 8% annual salary increment, while officials highlighted Jharkhand&#x27;s potential as a manufacturing hub.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxQQzJKT3duZ2EtVzI5aUltTGVvSzhHUkdIQnR5aEFWSFZDZHRCZmQ5c0I3RnZGZEhjaTVqN0IxdDh1dWhaU21OR0djUVUwX3cyb0FHUTUtVGJrNXZIMm9HbFRrZWhaeFhUMEhNd1QtUVUxMWRmN3ZZeDhIbGVjZnhtdmlYYXh1LUgtOFp4TWZHeXp5aDVLQVZrcHZfaU1EOEdsanJ3cmZGYjlMZnM?oc=5">J6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J11</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>RIMS leadership:</strong> Dr. DK Sinha has officially taken charge as the new Director of RIMS amid ongoing investigations.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J12</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Industrial tragedy:</strong> A laborer from Nirsa, Dhanbad, died following the collapse of a warehouse structure in Kolkata.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J9</a></span></li>
</ul>
